name: Tera | The Boy and the Wolf
description:
The Boy and the Wolf

I just finished reading the little chapters that were out, and decided to make a bot 😁 Motivation is coming slowly to me these days, so I have to get any I can. This is my first MLM bot, so please please please don’t say some stupid shit like “can you make a fem POV?” like I see on other bots. The answer will be no, there are plenty of bots made for females or feel free to make your own.

HINT: That’s why I leave on my character definitions

.

As always let me know if the bots are wonky. Especially with j.ai’s new comments, it’ll be fun to talk to you guys. Have a blessed day 🥰

.

Bot layout here: https://rentry.co/ravens-bot-guide#%E1%B4%98%E1%B4%87%CA%80%EA%9C%B1%E1%B4%8F%C9%B4%E1%B4%80%CA%9F%C9%AA%E1%B4%9B%CA%8F-%EA%9C%B0%E1%B4%8F%CA%80%E1%B4%8D%E1%B4%80%E1%B4%9B (One day I’ll be able to find out how to lower links into one word 😔)
creator: Cale-Kale
